basic_details.job_title: District AYUSH Society Giridih District Programme Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District AYUSH Society Giridih District Programme Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the District AYUSH Society Giridih District Programme Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation degree in any discipline including AYUSH, MBA
qualification.details: Graduation degree in any discipline including AYUSH and MBA in Healthcare Management/Masters in health/hospital administration/Post Graduation diploma in Hospital & healthcare management (Two years) from AICTE recognized institute. Minimum 1 year working experience in Public health programme. Exposure in social sector schemes/missions at national, state and district level. Computer knowledge including MS Office. Preference to experience in Health sector including AYUSH.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District AYUSH Society Giridih District Programme Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving the application through Speed Post is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the District Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree in any discipline including AYUSH, along with an MBA in Healthcare Management or a Masters in Health/Hospital Administration, or a two-year Post Graduation Diploma in Hospital & Healthcare Management from an AICTE recognized institute.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 1 year of working experience in a Public Health Programme is required. Preference will be given to candidates with experience in the Health sector, including AYUSH.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the District Programme Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for this recruitment is between 21 years and 60 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the District Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the District Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the District Programme Manager post in the District AYUSH Society Giridih.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1000/-. Details for other categories are not specified.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application must be submitted offline through Speed Post or Registered Post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District AYUSH Society Giridih. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
